testnet.notes: Republished 2026-06-03. payment_receipt::pay now takes a shared &Merchant: it splits exactly `amount` from the payer's coin (asserting value >= amount, no silent over-payment), returns change to the payer, sends the amount to the merchant's payout address, and records the merchant ID on the soulbound Receipt + PaymentMade event so a receipt proves payment to a *registered* merchant. Added payment_receipt::refund (MerchantCap-gated via merchant_registry::controls) and merchant_registry::register_and_share (shares the Merchant profile so a customer PTB can reference it; cap goes to the merchant). spending_vault::withdraw clamps to redeemable; mock_lender keeps principal (1:1) separate from an admin-funded yield_reserve (graceful redeem, never aborts), apy_bps bounded. LendingPool<USDC> created (tx 7zn8jH4uGcfaA2np8zjYBajhkhmZQyncVunjVQYGHYUp) and yield buffer funded with 10 USDC via mock_lender::fund_yield (tx 5HCqUVfqVuqaRKYYzdpZ9dnh3ECCZRECDy8vvc1AwHiV). Supersedes 0x6a6222e8... (arbitrary-payee pay, unlinked registry).
